notes:
There is an issue with grabbing the mouse in fullscreen, this can be solved by winetricks , opening this command in terminal : env WINEPREFIX="/steamapps/compatdata/385400/pfx/"  winecfg
Goto graphics tab, emulate a virtual desktop and automatically capture the mouse in full screen windows
title: Weapons Genius

notes: Except the mouse issue works fine.
